meaning: I swear you all will definitely come/arrive (addressing the disbelievers)
and not - combines two ideas and makes them negative
except (excluding what comes after from what was mentioned before)
so that he rewards (those who believe)
those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)
those (who believed and did good deeds)
and those who (who strove against Our signs)
those who try to challenge/frustrate (Allah's signs)
he (referring to what was sent down)
they believe (those who don't believe in the Hereafter)
their hands (referring to what is before them)
that, that one (pointing to something far)
and the birds (as something given to David)
and measure precisely! (command to Prophet Dawud about making armor)
of the weaving (of chain mail links)
for him, to him (referring to Sulaiman)
the jinn (invisible beings mentioned in this ayah about Prophet Sulaiman)
they work (referring to the jinn working for Prophet Sulaiman)
gratitude, thanks (as the object being given)
the jinn (as the subject who realized)
they know (referring to the jinn in this ayah)
so we sent forth (after they turned away)
upon them (referring to the people who turned away)
which/that (feminine, referring to the villages that)
in it/her (referring to the blessed towns mentioned)
and we tore them apart completely
so that we may know (purpose of having authority over them)
the act of helping by speaking for someone
was terrified (referring to what happened to their hearts)
they said (referring to those whose hearts had fear removed)
The Great One (a name/attribute of Allah)
The Supreme Judge (one of Allah's names)
the All-Knowing (divine name of Allah, subject of this sentence)
partners (being accused as false partners with Allah)
The Mighty, The Powerful (as a name of Allah, subject of this phrase)
and not (connects to previous negative statement)
when (past time, connected to what follows)
those who are made to stop (the wrongdoers in this ayah)
some of them (returning words to each other)
he says (describing what one group says to another in this ayah)
if not/were it not for (addressing those who were arrogant)
to those who (who were made weak)
we prevented/blocked you all (addressing the weak ones who were led astray)
the guidance (that was rejected by those who were arrogant)
rather (contradicting what the arrogant ones claimed)
they were made weak/were considered weak
the chains (that will be placed around the necks of those who disbelieved)
those who (referring to those who disbelieved)
they are given what is due
except for (what they used to do)
with it/by it (referring to what was sent with the warner)
more numerous (than others in wealth and children)
among those who are being severely punished
and not (connects to previous statement about wealth)
so those ones (referring to the believers mentioned before)
they strive/make effort (referring to those who try to invalidate Our signs)
Our signs/miracles (that the disbelievers are trying to challenge)
those who try to frustrate/challenge (Allah's signs)
they (all) are made to be present
he compensates/replaces it (referring to what was spent in the way of Allah)
he gathers them (referring to those who were worshipped besides Allah)
they said (referring to the disbelievers in this ayah)
besides them (referring to the false gods they used to worship)
rather/but rather (correcting the previous statement that they were our allies)
the jinn (as the object being worshipped)
so today (in response to their previous actions)
you all were (referring to those who denied the truth)
it (our clear signs) is being recited (upon them)
about what (asking what your forefathers used to worship)
except, only (in this ayah, used to restrict what follows to being the only possibility)
magic (that the disbelievers claimed about the truth)
any warner (in context: no warner had been sent before)
I advise you all (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in this ayah)
you all reflect/think deeply (command to a group)
if (introduces the condition that my reward is only from Allah)
so there is no (escape from punishment)
with their followers (like what was done to those before them)
indeed they (who are being prevented from what they desire)
